headline: Fuel surcharges wallop FedEx, UPS shippers as Amazon looms
summary: With customers facing elevated fees and seeking discounts, Amazon’s delivery services could impact market pricing in the long term, per the TD Cowen/AFS Freight Index.

headline: FedEx spreads shipping fees to EU, more zip codes
summary: FedEx is adding a new import fee for the European Union and increasing delivery and pickup surcharges for more than 200 zip codes, as it continues to squeeze customers for revenue by means other than general rate increases. The post FedEx spreads shipping fees to EU, more zip codes appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: United Parcel's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: United Parcel is expected to announce its second-quarter earnings in August, and Wall Street forecasts a single-digit increase in its bottom line.
